name: City Of Seneca Skoch Park
description: Come play pickleball at City Of Seneca Skoch Park in Seneca, KS! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: Sabetha Health & Wellness
description: Sabetha Health & Wellness is a place to play pickleball in Sabetha, KS. There is 1 indoor court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. A one-time fee is required to play.
